doc.overview: This workflow automates the qualification of inbound leads using a series of checks and validations. It efficiently processes lead information to determine readiness for sales engagement and captures relevant data in Airtable and Pipedrive.
phases: The workflow starts by receiving lead data via a webhook.
Various checks and verifications are applied to the lead data to assess quality and readiness.
Qualified leads are created as records in Pipedrive and relevant details are saved in Airtable.
nodes: Receives inbound lead data to trigger the workflow.
Restores the data received from the webhook for processing.
Prepares data structure for rejected leads.
Merges person, organization, and lead details for processing.
Requests an authentication token from Snov for email verification.
Initiates email verification for the provided lead data.
Pauses the workflow for 15 seconds to ensure verification processing.
Retrieves verification results from Snov to assess email validity.
Sets variables based on email verification results.
Executes logic to determine if an email is qualified.
Checks if the email meets qualification criteria.
Extracts names from the verification data.
Determines if the provided phone number has a valid carrier.
Parses results related to phone number verification.
Evaluates the quality score of the lead data.
Validates if the job position of the lead fits the ideal customer profile.
Analyzes the lead's main goals to assess relevance.
Merges the collected ideal customer profile checks for final evaluation.
Assembles the final qualification results for the lead.
Extracts and validates the company name from the data.
Checks if the domain matches the company name.
Creates a new registration record in Airtable for the qualified lead.
Checks if the email provided is a personal address.
Validates the country provided for the lead.
Constructs a comprehensive lead record for submission.
Uses OpenAI to match the lead's domain to the correct company.
Validates the accuracy of the company name using OpenAI.
Verifies the validity of the phone number through an external API.
Gathers all validations results for final assessments.
Ensures the accuracy of the parsed person name using OpenAI.
Updates the lead's hygiene record in Airtable.
Updates the lead's qualification status in Airtable.
Evaluates if the lead is qualified to be sent to Pipedrive.
Creates a new organization record in Pipedrive for the lead.
Adds a new person record in Pipedrive for the qualified lead.
Prepares necessary data for deal creation.
Creates a deal in Pipedrive associated with the lead.
Saves the created deal ID back to Airtable.
Requests additional data enrichment for the lead from Clay.
Prepares data required for interaction with the Clay API.
Combines IDs of deals and Airtable for tracking.
Extracts necessary IDs for saving in Airtable.
Classifies the email domain to assess its type.
Checks if the email verification process is completed.
Determines if the lead verification is ready for decision making.
Searches for existing person records in Pipedrive.
Confirms whether the person record already exists.
Checks the existence of the retrieved person record.
Updates the existing person record in Pipedrive.
Normalizes the person ID for consistency across the workflow.
Checks if the Pipedrive pipeline is accessible and functioning.
Merges waiting data for person and organization processes.
Searches for existing organization records in Pipedrive.
Assesses if the organization already exists in Pipedrive.
Adds a note regarding the duplicate organization in Pipedrive.
Evaluates the response received from the Clay API.
Checks if the enrichment process via Clay was unsuccessful.
Pauses the workflow for 5 seconds before retrying.
Retries the data enrichment request to Clay.
Marks email addresses as rejected in Airtable if not valid.
doc.notes: Ensure to monitor the webhook for responses and manage API limits for external services to avoid bottlenecks.
